name: The Last Stand
description:
(May be dead dove. TW: possible and brutality)

You are the heir of the coward Emperor of Rumania. Now only you, the sheltered and abandoned heir can lead your people to survival as forces of evil threaten to drown your city.

Welcome. This is my second bot. Instead of porn i decided to try out a war bot. The character definition have all the extra information you need to use the bot correctly.

My inspiration is the fall of Constantinople (with fantasy elements) but i used many references to quite a bit of pieces of fiction and some history while coming up with names. Lets see how many of them you can identify ;)

As always i am open to constructive criticism and suggestions. I want my bots to be as good as i can manage but i am not exoerienced in bot making so i would allreciate if you point out what i could do better. I hope i didnt overload the bot with characters that are optional to appear in the story 😅

Thanks to everyone who found interest in my second public bot ever <3
creator: Fritz309
